ns0:entry.ns0:title: Alishahryar1/free-claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Alishahryar1/free-claude-code
Language: python
Use claude code and codex for free in the terminal, VSCode extension, and discord like OpenClaw (voice supported)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVlabs/ProtoMotions
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVlabs/ProtoMotions
Language: python
ProtoMotions is a GPU-accelerated simulation and learning framework for training physically simulated digital humans and humanoid robots.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: agentskills/agentskills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentskills/agentskills
Language: python
Specification and documentation for Agent Skills

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alirezarezvani/claude-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alirezarezvani/claude-skills
Language: python
337 Claude Code skills & agent skills & plugins (30+ Agents, 70+ custom commands, 330+ skills, customizable references, scripts)for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory, research, business operations, commercial & finance, and your daily productivity skills.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ansible/ansible
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ansible/ansible
Language: python
Ansible is a radically simple IT automation platform that makes your applications and systems easier to deploy and maintain. Automate everything from code deployment to network configuration to cloud management, in a language that approaches plain English, using SSH, with no agents to install on remote systems. https://docs.ansible.com.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
Language: python
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: davila7/claude-code-templates
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/davila7/claude-code-templates
Language: python
CLI tool for configuring and monitoring Claude Code

ns0:entry.ns0:title: django/django
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/django/django
Language: python
The Web framework for perfectionists with deadlines.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: home-assistant/core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/home-assistant/core
Language: python
🏡 Open source home automation that puts local control and privacy first.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: huggingface/speech-to-speech
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/huggingface/speech-to-speech
Language: python
Build local voice agents with open-source models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langflow-ai/langflow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow
Language: python
Langflow is a powerful tool for building and deploying AI-powered agents and workflows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/agent-governance-toolkit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/agent-governance-toolkit
Language: python
AI Agent Governance Toolkit — Policy enforcement, zero-trust identity, execution sandboxing, and reliability engineering for autonomous AI agents. Covers 10/10 OWASP Agentic Top 10.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pytorch/pytorch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch
Language: python
Tensors and Dynamic neural networks in Python with strong GPU acceleration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rommapp/romm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rommapp/romm
Language: python
A beautiful, powerful, self-hosted rom manager and player.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: safishamsi/graphify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/safishamsi/graphify
Language: python
AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: usestrix/strix
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/usestrix/strix
Language: python
Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
